parameters.query:
SELECT 
  p.*,
  p.id AS property_id
FROM properties p
WHERE p.created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '6 hours'
AND p.status = 'active'
ORDER BY p.created_at DESC
LIMIT 100;

SELECT 
  ss.id,
  ss.user_email,
  ss.user_name,
  ss.user_phone,
  ss.max_price,
  ss.min_price,
  ss.min_bedrooms,
  ss.max_bedrooms,
  ss.province_filter,
  ss.city_filter,
  ss.property_type_filter,
  ss.notify_email,
  ss.notify_sms,
  ss.notify_whatsapp,
  ss.search_name
FROM saved_searches ss
WHERE ss.active = true
AND ss.notify_new_listings = true;

INSERT INTO notification_log (search_id, user_email, notification_type, matches_count, sent_at)
VALUES (
  '{{ $('Match Properties to Saved Searches').item.json.search_id }}',
  '{{ $('Match Properties to Saved Searches').item.json.user_email }}',
  'new_listings',
  {{ $('Match Properties to Saved Searches').item.json.matches_count }},
  NOW()
);
